message:
feat(label): integrate rich output into label subcommands

- label add/rm: Styled confirmation with colored labels and issue IDs
- label list: Styled label display for single issue or all unique labels
- label list-all: Panel with table showing label counts
- label rename: Styled confirmation with old→new transition
- Consistent label coloring via hash-based palette

Part of beads_rust-3di8 (Phase 4: Medium-Traffic Commands)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
